title: Rarely used video editing program collaboration #2
description:
The next sequel of the collaboration about using video editing software that is hardly being used in the youtube poop community.

Order of appearance & used software:

- Alfonzopancakes (Corrupster)
- AustRock9080 (Adobe After Effects)
- captainstewpid (trakAxPC)
- Cloaytonem2 (ShowBiz DVD 2)
- CorruptionSound (aTube Catcher, WinDVD Creator and avidemux)
- DipperPines1994 (Videopad)
- iamoutofideas1 (Audacity)
- MonsterSumoable (avs video editor)
- MRINSTRUCTIONBOOK (iMovie)
- NITROCONCRETE1 (Avid Studio)
- Sid1325 (Resolume Arena 4 and OpenBroadcasterSoftware)
- SpaghettiBicycle (Pinnacle Studio)
- Wonderman532 (iMovie and Audacity)

Answer to ZachareyTomcat:

I used Avidemux to add some effects, but the thing about the program is that if you add a little bit too much, the playback gets slowed down. I used aTube catcher to record the slow playback.
